message:
feat(bd-9chy.17): implement flockfile/funlockfile/ftrylockfile with ReentrantMutex

Add explicit locking methods to NativeFile:
- explicit_lock(): acquires lock for flockfile
- try_explicit_lock(): tries to acquire for ftrylockfile
- explicit_unlock(): releases lock for funlockfile

Update flockfile/funlockfile/ftrylockfile to use these methods instead
of being stubs. Uses parking_lot's ReentrantMutex with explicit unlock
via lock_api::RawMutex::unlock().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
